message:
refactor(core): Improve policy simulation code quality

Clean up policy simulation implementation with idiomatic Rust patterns:

- Fix potential panic: Use u64::try_from().unwrap_or(0) for timestamp
  conversion instead of direct cast that could panic on negative values
- Convert default_true() to const fn for compile-time evaluation
- Convert default_transport_mode() to const fn
- Convert default_safety_tier() to const fn
- Replace map().unwrap_or_else() with map_or_else() in provenance_from_request()

These are stylistic improvements that follow Rust best practices without
changing the observable behavior of the simulation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
